name: changa-asta
description: Vanilla web Changa Asta / Chowka Bara game.

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['docs/paths_output.md', 'scripts/__pycache__'].forEach(p => fs.rmSync(p, {recursive: true, force: true}))"
scripts.check: node --check game.js && node --check sw.js && node tests/rules.test.js
